subject: Fwd: Je would like the pilots up tonight!
body:
should I send this to Cecile to show her that Hobson may be providing info  
to 4 Star?
 
Darren K.  Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New  York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381

From: LVJET@aol.com
Subject: Re: Je would like the pilots up tonight!
Date: Wed, 18 Jun 2008 14:31:13 GMT
To: lesley@nysgllc.com
Cc: DKIESQ@aol.com

roger that<<<<<Bill and myself will be up tonight!  great.
impoortant!
Tell JE that I just received a call from Stewart Diamond owner of 4 Star  
hanger in STT, he said he's waiting for his attorney to draw up a letter of  
intent for us to sign. We should receive by Monday since his attorney is away  
till then.
His exact quote was "There is a chance that Port Authority is  looking for a 
reason to kick him out and not renew his lease, so he wants his  attorney to 
draft the letter to protect him!"
I included Darren on this email.
lv
